text: Passengers are departing and boarding the blue train.
A very small kitchen in a mobile home.
A man with a skateboard with some writing on it.
The family of three elephants walk across the green field together.
A group of well dressed people standing around a counter holding food.
A large pile of bananas is lying on the ground.
A cup with a banana sitting inside of it.
A lady swinging tennis racket near a treadmill.
A tiny powder room with pedestal sink, toilet, and green walls.
The door of the bathroom is standing open.
